Your AVATAR, Part 1
Module 2
Your Avatar…
• A composite representation of your ideal client
• Sometimes you might have more than one avatar
• If you do – you might want to do this exercise
we’re about to do for each avatar
Your Avatar…
• Think of your avatar as a real person
• Write / present as if it’s for one person
• Don’t write it for the 6,000 people on your list
• A real person will open that email and read it
• Never forget that you’re writing to one person
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	2
Your Avatar…
• Never “BLAST”
• We have a rule – we can’t use that word
• You send emails to your individual subscribers
• It’s about CONNECTION with your prospects and
clients
Connecting with your Avatar…
• The first step in connecting is to understand them
• Answer some questions to get insight for your
offer
• Picture your avatar in your head…
Defining your Avatar…
• What is your avatar’s biggest source of pain?
• What keeps them up at night?
• What scares your avatar?
• What is the biggest danger that they don’t
even see yet?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 6 --

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	3
Defining your Avatar…
• What are their greatest opportunities?
• What’s out there for them?
• Do they have opportunities they don’t even
know about yet?
• What is your avatar’s hopes and dreams?
• Who or what do they aspire to be?
This is so powerful. This is the basic
ingredient of how to connect with your
prospects and clients.
Your AVATAR, Part 2
Module 2
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	4
Think about your greatest case study…
• Think about an existing case study (if you have one)
• Imagine what would be your greatest case study (if
you don’t have one yet)
• Example: John Gallagher I talk about all the time
food stamps to 6-figures (and beyond)
• Think about YOUR greatest case study
When you’re selling something, it’s about
the transformation, the before and after…
• John Gallagher story…
• He got CDs and DVDs and books from me
• But when he got PLF, he didn’t get a book – he got a
life changing transformation
No matter what you’re selling, no matter
what you’re going to launch – you’re selling
transformation as well…
• You’re not selling…
• An online training course
• Or a webinar
• Or an in person seminar
• Or a book
• Or a widget
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 6 --

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	5
You’re selling how it’s going to change
their life.
Transformation and Results
• How has your product positively impacted their
life?
• How is their life different now because of your
product?
• (Look into the future 5/10 years and be as specific
and concrete as possible)
You’re changing the future for your people.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 6 --

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	6
Transformation and Results
• What will it cost your avatar to NOT have your
product?
• What extra pain and frustration?
• How much money?
• What will they miss out on?
• (Look into the future 5/10 years and be as specific
and concrete as possible)
Transformation and Results
• Who will your avatar become as a result of the
positive impact of your product?
• (Look into the future 5/10 years and be as specific
and concrete as possible)
What did you just learn about your avatar?
• You know more than your avatar and have a
greater capability for marketing than almost
anyone out there
• This is incredibly powerful
• And it will change over time so be sure to revisit
this avatar work
• If you have more than one avatar, work through this
for each one
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
